query:
SELECT dp.date, dp.id AS planId, COUNT(b.id) AS block_count
FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-21','2026-05-22')
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date ORDER BY dp.date;
